Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1181 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}And so, another new school year is upon us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1181 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I'd like each of you to remember the proverb, "If a job's worth doing, it's worth doing well."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1181 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}When applied to student life, this means...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}You came to school with Takeba-san this morning, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I saw you two walking together. You must be pretty close, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}What's the deal between you and her?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Oh, and does she have a boyfriend? Nobody seems to know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I thought you might know, but... I guess not.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Sounds like it's coming from Ms. Toriumi's class.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Hey, shhh! Be quiet! You're gonna get me in trouble![n]{f 1 1}
